description: prConcurrentLimit: 1 — serial automerge queue; avoids package-lock.json race conditions that occur when multiple concurrent dep update PRs each rebase and re-run CI after every merge.

rebaseWhen: conflicted (global) — major PRs sit unmerged intentionally; rebasing them on every automated merge would waste CI runs on a PR nobody is about to merge. Automated rules override this with behind-base-branch to keep the automerge chain moving.

packageRules.description: Add javascript label to match Dependabot language label convention
Add github-actions label to match Dependabot convention
Add docker label to match Dependabot convention
Angular and NX: manual upgrade only (ng update / nx migrate)
TypeScript: tightly coupled to Angular/NX version
ESLint ecosystem: coupled to TypeScript version
ng-packagr: coupled to Angular version
@ngrx/component-store: Angular-version coupled
@types/node: must match Node.js version in Docker images
@dasch-swiss/dsp-js: updated manually per release
CKEditor: custom build + Angular adapter tracked in DEV-6208; disable both until resolved
zone.js: maintenance mode — allow patches only (disable minor and major)

Major updates: PRs open automatically but require manual merge. Timing matters — merging a major before a release or production deployment could introduce undetected breakage that poor test coverage would miss. Human decides when it is safe to merge.
@jscutlery utilities: not in monorepo:swc preset — explicit standalone group
@sentry/cli: lives in getsentry/sentry-cli repo, not matched by monorepo:sentry-javascript — join sentry group manually
Jest test framework and utilities (^jest pattern intentionally broad: groups all jest-* packages including future additions)
Prettier and ESLint-prettier bridge (prettier is not in the ESLint monorepo group)
PostCSS + autoprefixer (autoprefixer not in postcss monorepo preset)
OpenAPI code generation
OpenSeaDragon image viewer
JWT decode
UUID
Test coverage tooling
Third-party Angular-compatible packages (not coupled to Angular version)
Automerge all dev dependency updates (patch + minor) — no age guard; dev deps don't affect production
Automerge production patch updates — 3-day age guard prevents adopting broken releases
Automerge production minor updates — 7-day age guard for extra caution on production code
